field.label: Listen
field.help: DNS listen address. Default: 0.0.0.0:53 (Unbound is moved to 5355 by install.sh).

field.label: Enhanced Mode
field.help: fake-ip = synthesize answers for sniffer-based routing (recommended); redir-host = redirect; normal = pass through.

field.label: Fake IP Range
field.help: CIDR used to synthesize fake answers.

field.label: Nameserver
field.help: Comma-separated list of upstream resolvers used for general queries.

field.label: Fallback
field.help: Comma-separated list of resolvers used as fallback for international domains.

field.label: Fake IP Filter
field.help: Comma-separated domain patterns excluded from fake-ip handling.

field.label: Hosts
field.help: Static host entries (format: domain=ip; one per line). Optional.
